business.name: TA Handyman
business.tagline: The fix you need, done right

hero.headline: Columbus homes trust us with the *tough stuff*
hero.subheadline: From bathroom remodels to gutter cleaning — we show up, quote fair, and finish strong. 5 stars from 49 neighbors who know.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every project handled right
services_section.subheading: From quick fixes to full remodels, we tackle what your house throws at us

services.title: General Repairs
services.description: Expert fixing of doors, windows, drywall, and household items to keep your home in perfect condition

services.title: Electrical Services
services.description: Safe installation and repair of outlets, switches, ceiling fans, and light fixtures by licensed professionals

services.title: Plumbing Solutions
services.description: Professional repair of leaky faucets, clogged drains, toilet issues, and minor plumbing installations

services.title: Painting & Touch-ups
services.description: Interior and exterior painting services, color matching, and detailed touch-up work for a fresh new look

services.title: Home Maintenance
services.description: Regular upkeep services including gutter cleaning, deck staining, and seasonal home preparation

about.heading: Honest work in Columbus for over a decade
about.body: We're the handyman service Columbus neighbors call when they need it done right. From small repairs to major remodels, we quote fair, communicate clearly, and finish what we start. Arthur and the TA Handyman team have built our reputation one satisfied customer at a time.

reviews.name: Neelam P.
reviews.text: Stress-free from quote to completion. Gutter cleaning was perfect and they charged exactly what they quoted. Professional team I'd use again.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: The $699 property refresh package completely transformed my house. Professional work worth every dollar.

reviews.name: Vitalina O.
reviews.text: Called for junk removal last night, they came next morning and cleaned out my entire garage. Fair price and awesome service.

reviews.name: Roman A.
reviews.text: Arthur remodeled our bathroom from A to Z. Easy to work with and completely transparent throughout the process.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving Columbus and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional handyman services throughout Central Ohio

cta.heading: Ready to get that project handled?
cta.body: Fair quotes, clear communication, and work that lasts. Call TA Handyman and see why Columbus trusts us with their toughest jobs.
